05 = Bedfast, unable to ambulate or be up in a chair. CHAR 2 x x
M0700_PR_AMBULATN (M0700) Prior Ambulation/Locomotion Prior ambulation/locomotion ability. 00 = Able to independently walk on even and uneven surfaces and climb stairs with or without railings (needs no human assistance or assistive device)
01 = Requires use of a device (e.g., cane, walker) to walk alone or requires human supervision or assistance to negotiate stairs or steps or uneven surfaces
